subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Sovereign of the seen and the unseen, Who through His perfect power hath created man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک غیب و شهودیرا لایق و سزاست که بقدرت کامله خود انسانرا خلق نمود و او
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat]
